title: State of a Ceramic stream
description: The state of a Ceramic stream as defined by the stream type aggregation and conflict resolution rules.

id.description: Multibase encoding of the stream id

event_cid.description: CID of the event that produced this state

dimensions.description: Dimensions of the stream, each value is multibase encoded.

data.description: Multibase encoding of the data of the stream. Content is stream type specific.
